name: Ahmed Abdelmotaleb Corp
recent_news: No public news, ownership records, or press coverage found as of 2026. Address (248 Fowler Ave) is a Jersey City residential building, suggesting a very small owner-operator livery/NEMT entity rather than a school-bus contractor.
fit_notes: Sub-scale (7 employees, <$0.5M est. revenue) and no evidence of yellow-bus school routes or NJDOE contractor code. Likely owner-operator livery/special-needs van service — not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Elbouraq Limo Inc
recent_news: No press, ownership, or M&A activity found. Name (Elbouraq Limo Inc) and Bayonne residential address (126 W 19th St) point to a sub-scale livery/limo operator with possible NEMT or special-needs van work, not a school-bus contractor.
fit_notes: Too small (7 employees, ~$0.5M revenue) and corporate form (Inc, 'Limo' in name) suggests livery rather than yellow-bus. Not a credible Summit tuck-in; deprioritize.

name: R & C Limo
recent_news: Yelp listing confirms R & C Limo operating in Bayonne (alternate address 29 W 29th St; phone 201-437-4555) offering limo, airport, personal driver and ride-share services. No school-bus contractor footprint identified in NJDOE contractor lists.
fit_notes: Independent owner-operator livery; not an apparent yellow-bus or special-needs school transport contractor. Sub-scale and out of Summit's tuck-in profile.

name: TNT Transportation Svc
districts_or_customers: Metro Richmond, VA seniors/disabled population (non-emergency medical trips)
recent_news: VirginiaNavigator profile (2025) describes TNT Transportation Services as a non-emergency medical and wheelchair transport provider serving older adults and people with disabilities in metro Richmond. Operates 24/7 by reservation; CPR-certified drivers; wheelchair-accessible vehicles. No school-district contracts identified.
fit_notes: Confirmed NEMT/medical transport — not a school-bus contractor. Outside Summit's K-12 contracted-route platform; not a tuck-in target. (Note: shares Glen Allen address with TNT Auto Rentals and TNT Limousine — likely common ownership across small mobility services.)

name: Carecar LLC
districts_or_customers: Oakland County, MI seniors and disabled population (NEMT)
recent_news: NPI 1356721757 issued June 2015 classifying CareCar LLC as Non-emergency Medical Transport (van) in Holly, MI. BBB and Yellow Pages list it as a disability/senior transport provider. No school-district contracts or yellow-bus fleet identified.
fit_notes: NEMT/disability van service, not K-12 school transport. Out of Summit's tuck-in profile; deprioritize. (Distinct from CareCar.co, a national NEMT marketplace.)
